title: [firtool] Can firtool replace special strings in format of assert op?

features.name: circt_chisel_ifelsefatal intrinsic with Chisel template format string
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL circt_chisel_ifelsefatal intrinsic whose format= attribute contains Chisel-style template tokens such as {{SimulationTime}} and {{HierarchicalModuleName}}, which firtool should expand when lowering to the emitted $error call
features.snippet: intrinsic(circt_chisel_ifelsefatal<format = "Assertion failed: {{SimulationTime}}, {{HierarchicalModuleName}}\n", label = "chisel3_builtin">, clock, enable, cond)

features.name: FIRRTL printf with Chisel template tokens for simulation time and hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL printf statement whose format string contains {{SimulationTime}} and {{HierarchicalModuleName}} template tokens, which firtool should lower to a $fwrite using %0t/$time and %m respectively

features.name: inconsistent template substitution between assertion intrinsic and printf
features.description: Code should include both a circt_chisel_ifelsefatal intrinsic and a printf statement with identical {{SimulationTime}} and {{HierarchicalModuleName}} format tokens so that the discrepancy in firtool's template substitution between the two constructs is exposed
features.snippet:
intrinsic(circt_chisel_ifelsefatal<format = "{{SimulationTime}}, {{HierarchicalModuleName}}\n", label = "chisel3_builtin">, clock, enable, cond)
printf(clock, UInt<1>(0h1), "{{SimulationTime}}, {{HierarchicalModuleName}}")
